title: Chunkit
description: A world pre-generator featuring with real-time disk space estimation.
body:
ChunkIt is a utility mod designed to eliminate "World Loading Lag." By pre-generating terrain via simple commands, it shifts the heavy processing load from real-time gameplay to a preparation phase, ensuring your exploration is smooth and stutter-free.

# 🛠️ Simplicity First

No complex menus or confusing toggles. Everything is handled directly through the chat:

Unified Command: Use /chunkit to manage all generation tasks.

Live Feedback: Receive real-time updates during the process, including file size estimates so you can monitor your world’s storage impact.

# ⚡ Performance Expectations

The Trade-off: While the mod is actively generating chunks, you may experience temporary performance drops. This is normal, as ChunkIt maximizes your hardware to finish the task as fast as possible.

The Result: Once the process is complete, you can fly, run, and explore your world with significantly reduced lag and no "map holes."
